author: Ashly Lorenzana
description: Define, render, and play quizzes inside Markdown notes. Standalone, with an optional public API for Meta Bind and JS Engine. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Ashly Lorenzana
manifest.description: Define, render, and play quizzes inside Markdown notes. Standalone, with an optional public API for Meta Bind and JS Engine.
manifest.name: Quizzable

name: Quizzable

releases.author: monapdx
releases.description:
An **Obsidian plugin** that allows users to create **playable quizzes** inside of notes.

**Currently supports:**

- Multiple choice quizzes
- Checkbox with multiple correct answers
- Re-ordering answers correctly
- Text input answers
- Scoring answers on submit
- Quiz results saved to front matter
releases.name: Quizzable 0.2.0
